3331260.name: Ho-Ho-Maze!
3331260.description:
Ho-Ho-Hold On!

 

**Santa's in trouble! ** A blizzard has swept some of his trusty reindeer into a treacherous snow maze jeopardizing Christmas Eve!

 

Guide Santa through the Maze towards each one of his reindeer while avoiding hungry wolves. As the more reindeer follow Santa it’s harder to avoid the wolves, be careful and patient, timing and choosing the right path are the keys in your journey.

Features:

 

-          Joyful and heartwarming christmas soundtrack

-          10 levels, each with a unique maze with increasing difficulty

-          4 maze sizes, each with an increased number of reindeer to be rescued
3331260.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
